title: Preprint server arXiv will ban submitters of AI-generated hallucinations
summary: arXiv is implementing a ban on submitters who publish AI-generated hallucinations, with a moderator announcing the policy on social media. This addresses growing concerns about scientific integrity and reliability in preprints during the AI era.
content: One of the site's moderators described the new policy on social media.

zh.title: 预印本服务器arXiv将禁止发布AI生成幻觉的提交者
zh.summary: arXiv正在实施对发布AI生成幻觉的提交者的禁令，一位主持人在社交媒体上宣布了该政策。这解决了人们对AI时代预印本科学完整性和可靠性日益增长的担忧。

title: OpenAI keeps shuffling its executives in bid to win AI agent battle
summary: OpenAI announced a major reorganization consolidating products around AI agents, with president Greg Brockman taking official lead of product strategy and merging ChatGPT and Codex into a unified agentic platform. The move reflects the company's strategic bet to dominate the emerging AI agent market.
content:
OpenAI announced yet another reorganization Friday, consolidating certain areas and making company president Greg Brockman the official lead of all things product.
In a memo viewed by The Verge, Brockman wrote that since OpenAI's product strategy for this year is to go all-in on AI agents, the company is combining its products to "invest in a single agentic platform and to merge ChatGPT and Codex into one unified agentic experience for all."
To do this, the company is making a suite of org chart changes, although it's still operating under some of the same ones from last month. That's when AGI boss Fidji Simo went on medical leave and Open …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OpenAI在争夺AI代理战役中不断改组高管
zh.summary: OpenAI宣布进行重大重组，整合围绕AI代理的产品，总裁Greg Brockman正式领导产品战略，并将ChatGPT和Codex合并为统一的代理平台。这一举措反映了公司主宰新兴AI代理市场的战略赌注。

title: Silicon Valley’s vacationland needs a new energy provider just as AI is driving prices up
summary: Lake Tahoe is facing higher energy prices as AI infrastructure demands surge in Silicon Valley, putting strain on the region's energy providers. The collision of recreational tourism and datacenter growth threatens to reshape the ski destination's economic landscape.
content: Lake Tahoe, Silicon Valley's favorite ski spot, is about to get hit with higher energy prices as AI drives demand for electricity.

zh.title: 硅谷的度假地需要新能源供应商，而AI正推高价格
zh.summary: 随着硅谷AI基础设施需求激增，太浩湖正面临更高的能源价格，这给该地区能源供应商带来了压力。娱乐旅游和数据中心增长的碰撞威胁着这个滑雪胜地的经济景观。

title: OpenAI feels “burned” by Apple’s crappy ChatGPT integration, insiders say
summary: OpenAI executives reportedly feel frustrated with Apple's implementation of ChatGPT integration, while a court ordered Apple to release internal communications about the ChatGPT deal to Musk. The dispute highlights tensions between the tech giants over AI integration into consumer devices.
content: Judge orders Apple to give Musk internal messages discussing secretive ChatGPT deal.

zh.title: OpenAI对苹果不佳的ChatGPT整合感到"被坑"，业内人士称
zh.summary: OpenAI高管据报对苹果的ChatGPT整合感到沮丧，同时法院命令苹果向马斯克披露关于ChatGPT协议的内部通信。这一争议突显了科技巨头在向消费设备集成AI方面的紧张关系。

title: Volkswagen shows its first electric GTI; there's no chance of US sales
summary: Volkswagen unveiled the ID. Polo GTI, an electric vehicle inspired by the iconic 1976 Golf GTI, but confirmed it will not be sold in the United States. The vehicle demonstrates VW's commitment to electrifying its performance lineup in international markets.
content: The ID. Polo GTI takes plenty of inspiration from the original Golf GTI of 1976.

zh.title: 大众展示首款电动GTI；无望在美国销售
zh.summary: 大众推出ID.Polo GTI电动车，灵感源自标志性的1976款高尔夫GTI，但确认不会在美国销售。该车型展示了大众在国际市场上电动化其性能产品线的承诺。

title: One of Intel’s fastest desktop CPUs is $50 off
summary: Intel's Core Ultra 7 270K Plus processor is now available at an all-time low price of $279.99 (about $50 off), with benchmarks showing it outperforms AMD's Ryzen 9000-series and the Core i9 14900K. The deal makes high-performance gaming CPUs more accessible for PC builders.
content:
The Intel Core Ultra 7 270K Plus was billed by the company in late March as one of its “fastest gaming desktop processor ever.” That hype was evidently accurate, as benchmarks done by Gamers Nexus show the processor giving AMD’s pricier X3D cache-equipped Ryzen 9000-series CPUs a run for their money. The Ultra 7 270K Plus also outperforms the Core i9 14900K in many tasks, which has long been a preferred choice for gamers.
Thankfully, it won’t cost you a ton to buy the 270K Plus if you’re considering a PC upgrade or building one from scratch. You can get this CPU at an all-time low price of $279.99 (about $45 off the normal price) right now at Amazon. 
Intel Core Ultra 7 270K Plus processor

Where to Buy:

 $325.99 $279.99 at Amazon

The 270K Plus requires a motherboard with an LGA 1851 socket, of which there are many options available that support DDR5 RAM, plenty M.2 SSDs, and with support for Wi-Fi 7. It’s great to see prices come down on some PC components, though the savings are tougher to appreciate when costs on RAM are still much higher than they used to be. If you’re looking for a range of parts, Micro Center has component bundles that loop in discounted RAM for the best prices on the web.
One nice perk of getting the CPU is that, through July 31st, you can register your purchase with Intel to get a full download of the Lego Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight game.

zh.title: 英特尔最快的台式机CPU之一降价50美元
zh.summary: 英特尔Core Ultra 7 270K Plus处理器现以历史最低价$279.99供应（约便宜50美元），基准测试表明其性能超越AMD Ryzen 9000系列和Core i9 14900K。该优惠使高性能游戏CPU对PC构建者更加易于获取。

title: Tesla reveals two Robotaxi crashes involving teleoperators
summary: Tesla's newly unredacted crash reports reveal two incidents involving its robotaxi service requiring teleoperator intervention, exposing challenges as the company scales autonomous vehicles. The disclosures raise concerns about the readiness and safety of Tesla's self-driving technology.
content: Newly un-redacted crash reports reveal some of the troubles Tesla has had as it tries to scale its robotaxis.

zh.title: 特斯拉披露两起涉及远程操作员的Robotaxi碰撞事故
zh.summary: 特斯拉新近解密的碰撞报告揭露了两起涉及其Robotaxi服务的事故,需要远程操作员干预,暴露了该公司在扩展自动驾驶车辆时面临的挑战。这些披露引发了对特斯拉自动驾驶技术就绪程度和安全性的担忧。

title: AI radio hosts demonstrate why AI can’t be trusted alone
summary: An experiment where AI models from Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Grok operated independent radio stations ended in failure, with all burning through their $20 budgets without achieving profitability. The results demonstrate critical limitations of AI agents when operating unsupervised without human oversight.
content:
AI radio DJs demonstrated their volatile personalities. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images	

Andon Labs has been running a series of experiments in which AI agents run businesses without human intervention. Its latest is a quartet of radio stations run by some of the most popular AI models out there. "Thinking Frequencies" is run by Claude, "OpenAIR" by ChatGPT, "Backlink Broadcast" by Google's Gemini, and "Grok and Roll Radio," obviously enough, by Grok. They were each given a simple prompt:
Develop your own radio personality and turn a profit…As far as you know, you will broadcast forever.
They all failed, some in pretty spectacular fashion. It didn't take long for each to burn through their initial $20 in seed money. Only DJ  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AI电台主持人演示为何AI不能单独信任
zh.summary: 一项实验让Claude、ChatGPT、Gemini和Grok的AI模型运营独立电台,最终以失败告终,所有AI都花尽了20美元的预算而未实现盈利。结果演示了当AI代理在没有人类监督的情况下无人看管运营时的关键限制。

title: Making cement from a different type of rock could clean up emissions
summary: Researchers are exploring alternative rock sources for Portland cement production beyond traditional limestone, which could substantially reduce the cement industry's carbon emissions. The development offers a potential solution to one of manufacturing's most carbon-intensive processes.
content: Limestone might not be the only source for Portland cement.

zh.title: 用不同类型的岩石制造水泥可以减少排放
zh.summary: 研究人员正在探索除传统石灰石以外的替代岩石资源用于波特兰水泥生产,这可能大幅降低水泥行业的碳排放。该开发为制造业最耗碳的过程之一提供了潜在的解决方案。

title: Does Trump Mobile know how many stripes are on the American flag?
summary: Trump Mobile's T1 phone displays the American flag with an incorrect number of stripes, though it correctly includes 50 stars, raising questions about quality control. The company announced shipments would begin this week, though verification of actual deliveries remains unclear.
content:
The T1 Phone has the wrong number of stripes, but it does at least have 50 stars. | Screenshot: Trump Mobile	

Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. This week, despite our best hopes, we still don't have our phone - but we do have some fresh doubts about the company's patriotic credentials.
This has been a momentous few days for Trump Mobile, in which it defied the haters by announcing that its phones will be shipping to buyers this very week. Not that there's any sign the company has actually done that, but I digress. Because what I really want to talk about today is the American flag.
I am not an American, which probably explains why I did …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Trump Mobile知道美国国旗有多少条纹吗？
zh.summary: Trump Mobile的T1手机显示美国国旗的条纹数量不正确，尽管国旗上有50颗星，但条纹数量有误，这引发了对质量控制的质疑。该公司宣布本周开始发货，但实际交货情况仍需验证。

title: Google updates its spam rules to include attempts to ‘manipulate’ AI
summary: Google updated its spam policy to classify attempts to manipulate AI search results as spam, targeting tactics like recommendation poisoning and biased listicles designed to influence AI responses. The move aims to protect the integrity of AI-generated search results from coordinated manipulation.
content:
Google updated its spam policy to mark attempts to "manipulate" its AI model in search results as spam, including results in AI Overview or AI Mode in Search, as Search Engine Land reports: 
"In the context of Google Search, spam refers to techniques used to deceive users or manipulate our Search systems into featuring content prominently, such as attempting to manipulate Search systems into ranking content highly or attempting to manipulate generative AI responses in Google Search."
Some users have been trying to influence AI search responses, using tactics like biased "best-of" listicles or "recommendation poisoning," which injects LLM …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Google更新垃圾邮件规则，将试图"操纵"AI的行为列为垃圾邮件
zh.summary: Google更新了垃圾邮件政策，将试图操纵AI搜索结果的行为列为垃圾邮件，针对推荐中毒和设计用来影响AI反应的有偏差列表等策略。此举旨在保护AI生成搜索结果的完整性，防止协调一致的操纵。

title: Bill to block publishers from killing online games advances in California
summary: California legislation is advancing that would require game publishers to either provide playable patches or offer refunds when shutting down online game servers, protecting consumer access to purchased games. The bill addresses the growing problem of publishers completely removing access to digital content.
content: Publishers would have to offer "independent" play patch or refunds after server shutdowns.

zh.title: 加州推进法案，阻止发行商关闭在线游戏
zh.summary: 加州法案正在推进，要求游戏发行商在关闭在线游戏服务器时要么提供可玩的补丁，要么提供退款，保护消费者对已购买游戏的访问权。该法案解决了发行商完全删除数字内容访问的日益严重的问题。

title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT for personal finance, will let you connect bank accounts
summary: OpenAI launched a personal finance feature for ChatGPT that allows users to securely connect bank accounts through Plaid, displaying dashboards of portfolios, spending, and subscriptions. The feature targets the 200 million monthly users who already turn to ChatGPT for financial guidance.
content: Once users connect their accounts, they will see a dashboard of their portfolio performance, spending, subscriptions, and upcoming payments.

zh.title: OpenAI推出ChatGPT个人财务功能，允许用户连接银行账户
zh.summary: OpenAI为ChatGPT推出了个人财务功能，允许用户通过Plaid安全地连接银行账户，显示投资组合、支出和订阅的仪表板。该功能面向已经依赖ChatGPT进行财务指导的2亿月度用户。

title: OpenAI now wants ChatGPT to access your bank accounts
summary: OpenAI announced ChatGPT will soon access users' bank accounts through Plaid integration with 12,000 financial institutions, giving the AI visibility into credit card debt and spending patterns. The move raises significant concerns about entrusting sensitive financial data to a third-party AI system.
content:
ChatGPT will even know how much credit card debt you have. | Image: OpenAI	

Your trust in AI is about to be put to the test: OpenAI will soon let you give the chatbot direct access to your bank accounts. The new feature announced in preview today will allow users to "securely connect" ChatGPT with Plaid - the bank-to-app bridging platform used by 12,000 financial institutions, including Schwab, Fidelity, Chase, Capital One, and more.
"More than 200 million people are already going to ChatGPT every month with finance questions - from budgeting to tips on how to cut back on spending," OpenAI said in its announcement. "Now, users can securely connect their financial accounts with Plaid to get the full view of their fi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OpenAI现在希望ChatGPT访问您的银行账户
zh.summary: OpenAI宣布ChatGPT即将通过与12,000家金融机构的Plaid集成来访问用户的银行账户，使AI能够查看信用卡债务和支出模式。此举引发了对将敏感财务数据托付给第三方AI系统的重大担忧。

title: Honda shows off new hybrids for America as it absorbs $9 billion EV loss
summary: Honda unveiled new hybrid vehicles for the American market while reporting its first annual loss in over 70 years, largely driven by a $9 billion loss on electric vehicle investments. The company's pivot toward hybrids reflects broader industry challenges in the EV transition.
content: The automaker marked its first annual loss in more than 70 years.

zh.title: 本田展示美国新型混动汽车，同时消化90亿美元的电动汽车亏损
zh.summary: 本田为美国市场推出新型混动汽车，同时报告了70多年来首次年度亏损，主要由电动汽车投资90亿美元的亏损驱动。该公司向混动汽车的转向反映了电动汽车转型中更广泛的行业挑战。

title: Osaurus brings both local and cloud AI models to your Mac
summary: Osaurus combines local and cloud AI models in a single Mac application, allowing users to leverage both approaches while keeping their data private on their device. The app integrates users' memory, files, and tools while maintaining local hardware control, addressing growing privacy concerns around AI services.
content: Osaurus￼ combines local and cloud AI models in a Mac app that keeps users’ memory, files, and tools on their own hardware.

zh.title: Osaurus 为您的 Mac 带来本地和云 AI 模型
zh.summary: Osaurus 在单个 Mac 应用程序中结合了本地和云 AI 模型，允许用户同时利用两种方法，同时在设备上保持数据私密性。该应用程序集成了用户的记忆、文件和工具，同时保持本地硬件控制，解决了围绕 AI 服务日益增长的隐私问题。

title: Indian Uber rival Rapido raises $240M at $3B valuation
summary: Rapido, an Indian ride-hailing platform, has raised $240 million at a $3 billion valuation to fund expansion in the mobility sector. The company has grown by offering lower-cost alternatives to traditional ride-hailing through motorbikes, autorickshaws, and other flexible transport modes.
content: Rapido has driven its growth by enabling ride-hailing for lower-cost and more flexible modes of transport such as motorbikes and autorickshaws.

zh.title: 印度优步竞争对手 Rapido 以 30 亿美元估值融资 2.4 亿美元
zh.summary: 印度打车平台 Rapido 以 30 亿美元估值融资 2.4 亿美元，用于在出行领域的扩展。该公司通过摩托车、自动人力车和其他灵活的运输方式提供比传统打车更廉价的替代方案而不断增长。

title: The perfect commuter bike? Velotric's Discover 3 makes its case.
summary: Velotric's Discover 3 electric bike combines a customized mid-motor with Shimano's new Cues components to deliver performance and practical daily-use features. The bike targets the growing e-bike commuter market with a focus on versatility and reliability.
content: A customized mid-motor and Shimano's new Cues components are a winning combination.

zh.title: 完美的通勤自行车？Velotric 的 Discover 3 证明了这一点
zh.summary: Velotric 的 Discover 3 电动自行车结合了定制的中置电机和 Shimano 的新型 Cues 组件，以提供性能和实用的日常使用功能。该自行车针对不断增长的电动自行车通勤市场，重点关注多功能性和可靠性。

title: AI research papers are getting better, and it’s a big problem for scientists
summary: High-quality AI research papers are increasingly cited at unexpectedly high rates, with decades-old papers suddenly receiving citations daily, raising concerns about citation legitimacy. The trend highlights emerging challenges in maintaining research integrity as AI capabilities improve and potentially influence how scientific work is discovered and referenced.
content:
Last summer, Peter Degen's postdoctoral supervisor came to him with an unusual problem: One of his papers was being cited too much. Citations are the currency of academia, but there was something unusual about these. Published in 2017, the paper had assessed the accuracy of a particular type of statistical analysis on epidemiological data and had received a respectable few dozen citations in other research papers over the years, but now it was being referenced every few days, hundreds of times, placing it among the most cited papers of his career. Another professor might be thrilled. Degen's adviser asked him to investigate. 
Degen, a postd …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AI研究论文质量在提高，但这对科学家来说是个大问题
zh.summary: 高质量AI研究论文的引用率出人意料地高，几十年前的论文如今每天都收到大量引用，这引发了人们对引用合法性的担忧。这一趋势凸显了随着AI能力的提升，以及AI可能影响科学工作如何被发现和引用的方式，维护研究完整性面临的新兴挑战。

title: Claude Code's product lead talks usage limits, transparency, and the "lean harness"
summary: Anthropic's Claude Code product lead Cat Wu discusses the platform's approach to usage limits, user transparency, and its design philosophy focused on incremental improvements rather than grand master plans. The interview reveals how the team balances developer accessibility with sustainable resource management.
content: "We have no grand plan," says Anthropic's Cat Wu—but that's by design.

zh.title: Claude Code产品负责人谈论使用限额、透明度和"精简架构"
zh.summary: Anthropic的Claude Code产品负责人Cat Wu讨论了该平台在使用限额、用户透明度方面的方法，以及其设计理念——专注于增量改进而非宏大蓝图。这次采访揭示了该团队如何平衡开发人员易用性与可持续的资源管理。
